title: RefinedMC
description: A lightweight Minecraft mod pack client that elevates the vanilla experience with quality-of-life improvements, performance optimizations, and subtle visual enhancements—perfect for players who want a smoother, richer game without straying far from the ori
body:
# RefinedMC

**RefinedMC** is a custom modpack I've created, featuring a curated selection of my favorite Minecraft mods. This pack is designed to enhance and refine the core vanilla experience, without drastically changing the game's mechanics or overall feel.

## About the Modpack

RefinedMC stays true to the spirit of Minecraft vanilla gameplay. Rather than overhauling the game with complex systems or major content additions, it focuses on:

- **Quality of Life Improvements**: Small tweaks and tools that make everyday gameplay smoother and more enjoyable.
- **Performance Enhancements**: Mods that help Minecraft run better, especially on lower-end systems.
- **Visual and Audio Upgrades**: Subtle improvements to textures, lighting, and sound that retain the classic look and feel of Minecraft.
- **Lightweight & Accessible**: Easy to install and play, without requiring a high-performance PC or extensive configuration.

## Purpose

The goal of RefinedMC is to provide a clean, polished Minecraft experience that feels just like vanilla—but better. Whether you're building, exploring, or surviving, the modpack aims to support and enrich your gameplay without overwhelming you.

## Ideal For

- Players who love vanilla Minecraft but want a bit more polish.
- Builders looking for creative enhancements.
- Casual players who want smoother performance and minor tweaks.
